title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy (and Never Sell)
text: When it comes to finding the best long-term dividend stocks to buy, yield should one be a key part of your overall criteria. It may sound tempting to build a dividend portfolio made up entirely of high-yielding names, but there are some flaws to such a strategy.

title: 3 Defense Stocks to Buy for Safe Dividends Now
text: There are plenty of reasons for investors to take a position in defense stocks. U.S. defense contractors tend to be safe and reliable investments.

title: 3 Defense Stocks To Watch Before June 2023
text: Defense stocks to watch in the stock market now.

title: Better Buy: Lockheed Martin vs. General Dynamics
text: Lockheed Martin and General Dynamics are staples of America's defense. Lockheed Martin has slightly better financials than General Dynamics.

title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Wins $67.9M Modification Deal for SEWIP
text: Lockheed Martin (LMT) secures a $67.9 million modification contract for the full-rate production of SEWIP's AN/SLQ-32(V)6 and AN/SLQ-32C(V)6 systems.

title: Lockheed (LMT) Wins Contract to Support Trident II Missile
text: Lockheed (LMT) is set to offer services related to production and deployed systems support for Trident II (D5) missile.

title: Who Will Build America's Next Great Fighter Jet?
text: The U.S. Air Force began ordering a new Next-Generation Air Dominance fighter for the 2030s and beyond. F for research and development of the new fighter jet, $16 billion is being earmarked.

title: F-16s should not be viewed as a magical solution to the war in Ukraine, Pentagon warns
text: WASHINGTON (AP) — Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said Thursday that European allies are developing a coordinated program to train Ukrainian forces on the F-16 fighter jet, but Pentagon leaders warned that it will be a costly and complex task and won't be a magic solution to the war.

title: Lockheed Martin Chairman, President and CEO and CFO to Speak at the Bernstein 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
text: BETHESDA, Md. , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) will webcast live a presentation by Chairman, President and CEO Jim Taiclet and CFO Jay Malave at the Bernstein 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, June 1, 2023 at 10:00 a.m.

title: Lockheed Martin is latest U.S. issuer to tap corporate-bond market ahead of potential debt-ceiling turmoil
text: Lockheed Martin Corp. became the latest U.S. issuer to tap the corporate-bond market ahead of any potential market fallout from the U.S. debt-ceiling fight, with a $2 billion offering that priced on Wednesday.

title: Lockheed (LMT) Secures $195M Deal to Support MK 41 VLS
text: Lockheed (LMT) is set to provide MK 41 VLS modules and ancillary hardware to support MK 41 VLS production requirements.

title: Lockheed (LMT) Wins $751M Contract to Support Missile Program
text: Lockheed (LMT) to supply Joint Air-to-Surface Standoff Missiles, along with containers, tooling and test equipment, and spares for missile program.

title: Lockheed (LMT) Secures Air Force Contract to Support JASSM
text: Lockheed (LMT) is set to provide maintenance, additional tooling and equipment for Joint Air-to-Surface Standoff Missile.

title: Lockheed Martin: A Mission-First Culture And Diversified Portfolio
text: Lockheed Martin's strength lies in its diversified product portfolio, deep understanding of customer missions, and mission-first culture that makes it a trusted partner for its clients. Lockheed Martin faces several risks, including a shift in the US government's approach to space-based systems and the loss of key projects, which could impact its long-term growth prospects.

title: Lockheed Martin's Dividend: Aging Like Fine Wine
text: Lockheed Martin Corporation is set to announce its 21st consecutive dividend increase in September. Dividend coverage looks much stronger now than in 2014 in most metrics.

title: Private Space Stations Are Coming in 2025
text: Boeing, Lockheed Martin, and Northrop Grumman have all announced plans to begin building private space stations as early as 2027. One private space company, Axiom Space, says it will build its space station two years before that, in 2025.

title: Biden said to have told G-7 allies in Hiroshima that he's signed off on plan to train Ukraine pilots to fly U.S.-made F-16s
text: HIROSHIMA, Japan (AP) — President Joe Biden told allies Friday he was approving plans to train Ukrainian pilots on U.S.-made F-16 fighter jets, according to two people familiar with the matter, as leaders of the world's most powerful democracies worked to toughen punishments on Russia for its 15-month-old invasion of Ukraine.

title: Lockheed Martin on Blue Origin's National Team Selected to Develop Human Lunar Lander
text: NASA's Sustainable Human Landing System Will Land Crew on the Moon for Artemis V DENVER , May 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) is on the team that has won a contract from NASA to develop and demonstrate a human landing system for the Artemis program under the agency's Human Landing System program. The goal of the program is to rapidly develop a sustainable human lunar lander and perform a crewed demonstration flight to the lunar surface for Artemis V.

title: U.S. Air Force to award sixth-generation fighter contract in 2024
text: The U.S. Air Force intends to award a contract in 2024 for its sixth-generation fighter jet, the service said on Thursday.

title: IFS and Lockheed Martin Sign Enhanced Partnership to Keep Aerospace and Defense Assets Mission-Ready
text: Partnership focuses on turning data into actionable information for aerospace and defense platforms LONDON , May 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, IFS, the global cloud enterprise applications provider, and Lockheed Martin announced a joint partnership to promote products and services to help aerospace and defense organizations maximize the value of their enterprise software investments, modernize their equipment maintenance and support processes, and keep assets mission-ready. IFS and Lockheed Martin have worked together for a number of years.

title: Is This Dark Horse Space Company the Next SpaceX?
text: Relativity Space conducted a mostly successful Terran 1 rocket launch in March. The company is already ditching that design, though, and building a bigger rocket: Terran R.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy in May 2023
text: While large-capitalization enterprises don't offer much excitement, current circumstances may call for the best blue-chip stocks to buy. Frankly, it's getting a little bit toasty on Wall Street, which is why stability may come at a premium.

title: The Private Space Industry Is Booming. Investors Had Better Be Careful.
text: The space race is on, with as many as 7,300 satellites orbiting Earth and plans for tens of thousands more. Here's a look at the big players and what's at stake.

title: 3 Defense Stocks to Buy for the Long-Term Portfolio
text: Amidst macroeconomic uncertainty, equity markets are providing an excellent opportunity to consider exposure to some of the best defense stocks to buy. World military expenditure increased by 3.7% on a year-on-year basis for 2022 to $2.2 trillion.

title: Lockheed Martin Is Best Of Breed And Worth Considering
text: Lockheed Martin offers investors a compelling combination of income growth and capital appreciation upside. Short-term hurdles are holding down deliveries of its F-35 jet fighters this year, though these headwinds should abate in the medium term.
